title: Tab Gamemode Tracker
description: Ever wondered if any of your friends secretly use Creative mode? Now you’ll easily know just by press Tab!
body:
### How to Install

1. Download the mod.
2. Open your `.minecraft` directory.
3. Move the mod file into the `mods` folder.
4. Launch the game.

---

### What the Mod Does

1. Lets you set background colors for players based on their gamemode.
2. Customize colors using Mod Menu + YACL.
3. Adjust transparency for each gamemode individually.
---
### Dependencies:
* [YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
* [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
---
##### You can also remove the background (by using the same color for all gamemodes or setting transparency to 100%).
